🤖 agent-turn

Assistant


Hello, Florian! I'm an AI assistant designed to help you with information and tasks. You can ask me about the weather, save or retrieve personal information, or let me know how else I can assist. 😊

        "message": [

            "data": {

              "content": "Hi. My name is Florian. Who are you?",

            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {
                "refusal": null
              },
              "content": "\n\nHello, Florian! I'm an AI assistant designed to help you with information and tasks. You can ask me about the weather, save or retrieve personal information, or let me know how else I can assist. \ud83d\ude0a\n",

            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {},
              "content": "I am 35 years old. Really old...",

        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {},
              "content": "Hi. My name is Florian. Who are you?",

              "response_metadata": {},
              "type": "human"

            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {
                "refusal": null
              },
              "content": "\n\nHello, Florian! I'm an AI assistant designed to help you with information and tasks. You can ask me about the weather, save or retrieve personal information, or let me know how else I can assist. \ud83d\ude0a\n",

          "content": "The weather in Bad Aibling is snowy.",

          "name": "get_current_weather",
          "tool_call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-9d60075d8c2a83eb"

              "additional_kwargs": {

              },
              "content": "\n\nThe current weather in Bad Aibling is snowy. Let me know if you need additional details!\n",

              "invalid_tool_calls": [],

          }

        "type": "message"
      },
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {},
              "content": "And what is the whether in Berlin?",

Raw Event 
{
  "atof_version": "0.1",
  "attributes": [],
  "category": "agent",
  "category_profile": null,
  "data": {
    "messages": [
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {},
              "content": "Hi. My name is Florian. Who are you?",
              "id": "f89a88ae-eaa5-472e-9205-d69ebdbbb067",
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {},
              "type": "human"
            },
            "type": "human"
          }
        ],
        "type": "message"
      },
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {
                "refusal": null
              },
              "content": "\n\nHello, Florian! I'm an AI assistant designed to help you with information and tasks. You can ask me about the weather, save or retrieve personal information, or let me know how else I can assist. \ud83d\ude0a\n",
              "id": "lc_run--019f6fd4-a08c-70a0-b1c1-937ace22a3f4-0",
              "invalid_tool_calls": [],
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {
                "finish_reason": "stop",
                "id": "chatcmpl-8c50ef66ea55f9b3",
                "logprobs": null,
                "model_name": "nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-nano-9b-v2",
                "model_provider": "openai",
                "system_fingerprint": null,
                "token_usage": {
                  "completion_tokens": 206,
                  "completion_tokens_details": null,
                  "prompt_tokens": 356,
                  "prompt_tokens_details": null,
                  "total_tokens": 562
                }
              },
              "tool_calls": [],
              "type": "ai",
              "usage_metadata": {
                "input_token_details": {},
                "input_tokens": 356,
                "output_token_details": {},
                "output_tokens": 206,
                "total_tokens": 562
              }
            },
            "type": "ai"
          }
        ],
        "type": "message"
      },
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {},
              "content": "I am 35 years old. Really old...",
              "id": "6d651bda-2768-4c3d-9752-815ffa283f9c",
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {},
              "type": "human"
            },
            "type": "human"
          }
        ],
        "type": "message"
      },
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {
                "refusal": null
              },
              "content": "\n\nAh, 35 isn't too bad! Would you like me to save that for you? \ud83d\ude0a\n",
              "id": "lc_run--019f6fd4-f504-7fb3-8e6c-91084fbf5acd-0",
              "invalid_tool_calls": [],
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {
                "finish_reason": "stop",
                "id": "chatcmpl-ba638c9b4abf754f",
                "logprobs": null,
                "model_name": "nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-nano-9b-v2",
                "model_provider": "openai",
                "system_fingerprint": null,
                "token_usage": {
                  "completion_tokens": 259,
                  "completion_tokens_details": null,
                  "prompt_tokens": 421,
                  "prompt_tokens_details": null,
                  "total_tokens": 680
                }
              },
              "tool_calls": [],
              "type": "ai",
              "usage_metadata": {
                "input_token_details": {},
                "input_tokens": 421,
                "output_token_details": {},
                "output_tokens": 259,
                "total_tokens": 680
              }
            },
            "type": "ai"
          }
        ],
        "type": "message"
      },
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {},
              "content": "Please save it for me.",
              "id": "0acbc139-2c67-4b0f-acf1-fbca2ec38ef0",
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {},
              "type": "human"
            },

      },

Raw Event 
{
  "atof_version": "0.1",
  "attributes": [],
  "category": "agent",
  "category_profile": null,
  "data": {
    "messages": [
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {},
              "content": "Hi. My name is Florian. Who are you?",
              "id": "f89a88ae-eaa5-472e-9205-d69ebdbbb067",
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {},
              "type": "human"
            },
            "type": "human"
          }
        ],
        "type": "message"
      },
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {
                "refusal": null
              },
              "content": "\n\nHello, Florian! I'm an AI assistant designed to help you with information and tasks. You can ask me about the weather, save or retrieve personal information, or let me know how else I can assist. \ud83d\ude0a\n",
              "id": "lc_run--019f6fd4-a08c-70a0-b1c1-937ace22a3f4-0",
              "invalid_tool_calls": [],
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {
                "finish_reason": "stop",
                "id": "chatcmpl-8c50ef66ea55f9b3",
                "logprobs": null,
                "model_name": "nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-nano-9b-v2",
                "model_provider": "openai",
                "system_fingerprint": null,
                "token_usage": {
                  "completion_tokens": 206,
                  "completion_tokens_details": null,
                  "prompt_tokens": 356,
                  "prompt_tokens_details": null,
                  "total_tokens": 562
                }
              },
              "tool_calls": [],
              "type": "ai",
              "usage_metadata": {
                "input_token_details": {},
                "input_tokens": 356,
                "output_token_details": {},
                "output_tokens": 206,
                "total_tokens": 562
              }
            },
            "type": "ai"
          }
        ],
        "type": "message"
      },
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {},
              "content": "I am 35 years old. Really old...",
              "id": "6d651bda-2768-4c3d-9752-815ffa283f9c",
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {},
              "type": "human"
            },
            "type": "human"
          }
        ],
        "type": "message"
      },
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {
                "refusal": null
              },
              "content": "\n\nAh, 35 isn't too bad! Would you like me to save that for you? \ud83d\ude0a\n",
              "id": "lc_run--019f6fd4-f504-7fb3-8e6c-91084fbf5acd-0",
              "invalid_tool_calls": [],
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {
                "finish_reason": "stop",
                "id": "chatcmpl-ba638c9b4abf754f",
                "logprobs": null,
                "model_name": "nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-nano-9b-v2",
                "model_provider": "openai",
                "system_fingerprint": null,
                "token_usage": {
                  "completion_tokens": 259,
                  "completion_tokens_details": null,
                  "prompt_tokens": 421,
                  "prompt_tokens_details": null,
                  "total_tokens": 680
                }
              },
              "tool_calls": [],
              "type": "ai",
              "usage_metadata": {
                "input_token_details": {},
                "input_tokens": 421,
                "output_token_details": {},
                "output_tokens": 259,
                "total_tokens": 680
              }
            },
            "type": "ai"
          }
        ],
        "type": "message"
      },
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {},
              "content": "Please save it for me.",
              "id": "0acbc139-2c67-4b0f-acf1-fbca2ec38ef0",
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {},
              "type": "human"
            },

      },
      {

              "additional_kwargs": {

Raw Event 
{
  "atof_version": "0.1",
  "attributes": [],
  "category": "agent",
  "category_profile": null,
  "data": {
    "messages": [
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {},
              "content": "Hi. My name is Florian. Who are you?",
              "id": "f89a88ae-eaa5-472e-9205-d69ebdbbb067",
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {},
              "type": "human"
            },
            "type": "human"
          }
        ],
        "type": "message"
      },
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {
                "refusal": null
              },
              "content": "\n\nHello, Florian! I'm an AI assistant designed to help you with information and tasks. You can ask me about the weather, save or retrieve personal information, or let me know how else I can assist. \ud83d\ude0a\n",
              "id": "lc_run--019f6fd4-a08c-70a0-b1c1-937ace22a3f4-0",
              "invalid_tool_calls": [],
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {
                "finish_reason": "stop",
                "id": "chatcmpl-8c50ef66ea55f9b3",
                "logprobs": null,
                "model_name": "nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-nano-9b-v2",
                "model_provider": "openai",
                "system_fingerprint": null,
                "token_usage": {
                  "completion_tokens": 206,
                  "completion_tokens_details": null,
                  "prompt_tokens": 356,
                  "prompt_tokens_details": null,
                  "total_tokens": 562
                }
              },
              "tool_calls": [],
              "type": "ai",
              "usage_metadata": {
                "input_token_details": {},
                "input_tokens": 356,
                "output_token_details": {},
                "output_tokens": 206,
                "total_tokens": 562
              }
            },
            "type": "ai"
          }
        ],
        "type": "message"
      },
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {},
              "content": "I am 35 years old. Really old...",
              "id": "6d651bda-2768-4c3d-9752-815ffa283f9c",
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {},
              "type": "human"
            },
            "type": "human"
          }
        ],
        "type": "message"
      },
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {
                "refusal": null
              },
              "content": "\n\nAh, 35 isn't too bad! Would you like me to save that for you? \ud83d\ude0a\n",
              "id": "lc_run--019f6fd4-f504-7fb3-8e6c-91084fbf5acd-0",
              "invalid_tool_calls": [],
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {
                "finish_reason": "stop",
                "id": "chatcmpl-ba638c9b4abf754f",
                "logprobs": null,
                "model_name": "nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-nano-9b-v2",
                "model_provider": "openai",
                "system_fingerprint": null,
                "token_usage": {
                  "completion_tokens": 259,
                  "completion_tokens_details": null,
                  "prompt_tokens": 421,
                  "prompt_tokens_details": null,
                  "total_tokens": 680
                }
              },
              "tool_calls": [],
              "type": "ai",
              "usage_metadata": {
                "input_token_details": {},
                "input_tokens": 421,
                "output_token_details": {},
                "output_tokens": 259,
                "total_tokens": 680
              }
            },
            "type": "ai"
          }
        ],
        "type": "message"
      },
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {},
              "content": "Please save it for me.",
              "id": "0acbc139-2c67-4b0f-acf1-fbca2ec38ef0",
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {},
              "type": "human"
            },

      },

Raw Event 
{
  "atof_version": "0.1",
  "attributes": [],
  "category": "agent",
  "category_profile": null,
  "data": {
    "messages": [
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {},
              "content": "Hi. My name is Florian. Who are you?",
              "id": "f89a88ae-eaa5-472e-9205-d69ebdbbb067",
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {},
              "type": "human"
            },
            "type": "human"
          }
        ],
        "type": "message"
      },
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {
                "refusal": null
              },
              "content": "\n\nHello, Florian! I'm an AI assistant designed to help you with information and tasks. You can ask me about the weather, save or retrieve personal information, or let me know how else I can assist. \ud83d\ude0a\n",
              "id": "lc_run--019f6fd4-a08c-70a0-b1c1-937ace22a3f4-0",
              "invalid_tool_calls": [],
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {
                "finish_reason": "stop",
                "id": "chatcmpl-8c50ef66ea55f9b3",
                "logprobs": null,
                "model_name": "nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-nano-9b-v2",
                "model_provider": "openai",
                "system_fingerprint": null,
                "token_usage": {
                  "completion_tokens": 206,
                  "completion_tokens_details": null,
                  "prompt_tokens": 356,
                  "prompt_tokens_details": null,
                  "total_tokens": 562
                }
              },
              "tool_calls": [],
              "type": "ai",
              "usage_metadata": {
                "input_token_details": {},
                "input_tokens": 356,
                "output_token_details": {},
                "output_tokens": 206,
                "total_tokens": 562
              }
            },
            "type": "ai"
          }
        ],
        "type": "message"
      },
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {},
              "content": "I am 35 years old. Really old...",
              "id": "6d651bda-2768-4c3d-9752-815ffa283f9c",
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {},
              "type": "human"
            },
            "type": "human"
          }
        ],
        "type": "message"
      },
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {
                "refusal": null
              },
              "content": "\n\nAh, 35 isn't too bad! Would you like me to save that for you? \ud83d\ude0a\n",
              "id": "lc_run--019f6fd4-f504-7fb3-8e6c-91084fbf5acd-0",
              "invalid_tool_calls": [],
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {
                "finish_reason": "stop",
                "id": "chatcmpl-ba638c9b4abf754f",
                "logprobs": null,
                "model_name": "nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-nano-9b-v2",
                "model_provider": "openai",
                "system_fingerprint": null,
                "token_usage": {
                  "completion_tokens": 259,
                  "completion_tokens_details": null,
                  "prompt_tokens": 421,
                  "prompt_tokens_details": null,
                  "total_tokens": 680
                }
              },
              "tool_calls": [],
              "type": "ai",
              "usage_metadata": {
                "input_token_details": {},
                "input_tokens": 421,
                "output_token_details": {},
                "output_tokens": 259,
                "total_tokens": 680
              }
            },
            "type": "ai"
          }
        ],
        "type": "message"
      },
      {
        "message": [
          {
            "data": {
              "additional_kwargs": {},
              "content": "Please save it for me.",
              "id": "0acbc139-2c67-4b0f-acf1-fbca2ec38ef0",
              "name": null,
              "response_metadata": {},
              "type": "human"
            },

      },
